title: You Passed Out!
description: Changes the "You Died!" and other references of death to "Family Friendly" words
body:
# 💀You Passed Out! 💀
This resource pack changes the "You Died!" text on the death screen to be more family friendly. It makes it say "You Passed Out!" instead of "You Died!". It also changes a few references to death to "Unalive" and "Pass Out".

## 🏳‍🌈 Check out [Pridecraft](https://pridecraft.gay)! 🏳‍🌈
If you want your minecraft to have a vanilla+ LGBT Pride resourcepack, check out [PridePack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pridepack)!
You may also want to check out other [Pridecraft Studios](https://modrinth.com/user/Pridecraft) projects once we release other ones! Our biggest project on the makings is [PrideMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pridemod).
